initial_candidates.sql:
WITH crime_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        a.district_id,
        COUNT(t.trans_id) AS crime_count
    FROM 
        trans t
    JOIN 
        account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
    WHERE 
        t.date LIKE '1996%'
    GROUP BY 
        a.district_id
    ORDER BY 
        crime_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    COUNT(a.account_id) AS account_count
FROM 
    account a
JOIN 
    crime_counts cc ON a.district_id = cc.district_id;

SELECT COUNT(account_id) 
FROM account 
WHERE district_id = (
    SELECT district_id 
    FROM trans 
    JOIN account ON trans.account_id = account.account_id 
    WHERE trans.date LIKE '1996%' 
    GROUP BY account.district_id 
    ORDER BY COUNT(trans.trans_id) DESC 
    LIMIT 1
);

WITH crime_by_district AS (
    SELECT 
        a.district_id,
        COUNT(t.trans_id) AS crime_count
    FROM 
        trans t
    JOIN 
        account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
    WHERE 
        t.date LIKE '1996%'
    GROUP BY 
        a.district_id
    ORDER BY 
        crime_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS account_count
FROM 
    account a
JOIN 
    crime_by_district cbd ON a.district_id = cbd.district_id;

WITH crime_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    a.district_id,
    COUNT(t.trans_id) AS crime_count
  FROM trans t
  JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
  WHERE t.date LIKE '1996%'
  GROUP BY a.district_id
  ORDER BY crime_count DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM account a
JOIN crime_counts cc ON a.district_id = cc.district_id;

WITH CrimeCountByDistrict AS (
    SELECT 
        a.district_id,
        COUNT(t.trans_id) AS crime_count
    FROM 
        trans t
    JOIN 
        account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
    WHERE 
        t.date LIKE '1996%'
    GROUP BY 
        a.district_id
    ORDER BY 
        crime_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS account_count
FROM 
    account a
WHERE 
    a.district_id = (SELECT district_id FROM CrimeCountByDistrict);

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH crime_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    a.district_id,
    COUNT(t.trans_id) AS crime_count
  FROM trans t
  JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
  WHERE t.date LIKE '1996%'
  GROUP BY a.district_id
  ORDER BY crime_count DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM account a
JOIN crime_counts cc ON a.district_id = cc.district_id;
